<!--
Questions are often answered faster in GitHub Discussions than in the
issue tracker — consider asking there first (link on the "New issue"
chooser page).
-->

## Pre-flight

Please confirm you've checked the docs that most often answer setup and
operations questions:

- [ ] **`docs/RUNBOOK.md`** — operating the server, environment variables, common failure modes
- [ ] **`README.md`** — quickstart and configuration
- [ ] **`CONTRIBUTING.md`** — building and running locally
- [ ] Existing issues and Discussions

If `docs/RUNBOOK.md` already covers this, you probably don't need to file —
but if it's unclear or wrong, tell us where (that's a docs bug worth fixing).

## Your question

What are you trying to do, and where are you stuck?

## Context

- **Server version / commit:**
- **Deployment & MCP client:**
- **Chain:** testnet / mainnet
- **What you've tried:**
